meta.title: Walk and Tour Copenhagen | Walking Tours & Local Experiences
meta.description: Copenhagen walking tours and local experiences led by passionate guides. Free tours, castle visits, and day trips.

home.heading: Copenhagen Walking Tours & Unique Local Experiences
home.subheading: Discover Copenhagen through stories, history and unforgettable local experiences led by passionate guides.

companies.heading: Corporate & Team Building Experiences in Copenhagen

tours.heading: Choose the Perfect Tour for Your Visit
tours.intro1: Whether you are interested in history, architecture, food, royal palaces or day trips, we have the perfect experience waiting for you.
tours.intro2: Explore Copenhagen your way - with small groups, expert guides and flexible options designed for every traveler.
tours.noResults: No tours match the selected filters.

defaults.aboutTourDescription: Join one of our guided walking experiences and discover Copenhagen with local insights, iconic landmarks and practical recommendations for the rest of your stay.
highlights: Led by experienced local guides who bring each stop to life with stories and context.
Balanced route mixing top landmarks with less crowded local spots.
Great for first-time visitors and returning travelers looking for deeper context.
Small-group format designed for interaction and flexibility.
defaults.itineraryDescription: Gather at the meeting point, get a quick overview of the route, then explore key streets, squares and monuments while learning about Copenhagen's history, architecture and local culture. Finish with practical city tips, food suggestions and recommendations for what to visit next.
included: Guided walking experience with an experienced local guide
Storytelling and historical context at every major stop
Curated local recommendations for the rest of your stay
defaults.customerSupportDescription: We have a professional customer support team and always accompany you on every trip.

copenhagenFreeTour.aboutTourDescription: Looking for a Free Walking Tour in Copenhagen? Join us at 10:30 AM to see the Changing of the Guard at Amalienborg Palace. Discover Nyhavn and the city's history with local guides. Book your free spot now.
highlights: Free Tour of Copenhagen's Old Town: A 2-hour guided introduction in English.
Meet at City Hall Square: Your starting point for exploring the Danish capital.
Iconic Landmarks: See Christiansborg Palace, Nyhavn, and Amalienborg Palace.
Historic Charm: Discover medieval squares like Nytorv and Gammeltorv.
Architectural Highlights: Admire St. Nicholas Church and the Marble Church.
Royal Tradition: Witness the Changing of the Guard at Amalienborg Palace (10:30 am tour).
copenhagenFreeTour.itineraryDescription:
Our walking tour will take you from the imposing City Hall Square, the vibrant meeting point and enduring symbol of the city. From there, we'll journey to the medieval squares of Nytorv and Gammeltorv, where time seems to stand still amidst charming architecture and echoes of the past. You'll truly feel the power of Danish history as you gaze at Christiansborg Palace, the seat of Danish democracy and royalty for centuries. Marvel at the architectural beauty of St. Nicholas Church, a striking landmark with a unique history.

As we continue, we'll arrive at Kongens Nytorv, where elegance and urban life merge in a vibrant atmosphere, surrounded by grand buildings. Copenhagen's Royal Theatre invites you to immerse yourself in Denmark's rich culture, showcasing its artistic heritage. Next, Nyhavn, with its colorful facades and historic ships, offers the perfect postcard view of the city, a truly picturesque spot. The majesty of the Marble Church will take your breath away with its impressive dome and intricate details. And, for those joining our 10:30 am tour, you'll witness the solemn Changing of the Guard at Amalienborg Palace, a captivating tradition that beautifully captures the essence of Danish royalty.
included: Professional English-speaking guide throughout the trip.
Our recommendation map.
Visit Copenhagen must-sees in 2 hours.
notIncluded: Personal expenses such as souvenirs and extra meals.
Travel insurance for medical emergencies and trip cancellations.
Optional activities and services not mentioned in the itinerary.
copenhagenFreeTour.title: Free Tour Copenhague: Cambio de Guardia y Centro Histórico
copenhagenFreeTour.imageAlt: Free Tour Copenhague: Cambio de Guardia y Centro Histórico

rosenborgCastleTour.aboutTourDescription: Embark on a magical journey through the heart of Danish royal legacy with our exclusive 2-hour tour of the majestic Rosenborg Palace in Copenhagen. This experience is designed to immerse you in the rich history of this Renaissance jewel, once the cherished royal residence of the beloved King Christian IV. Our tour promises an exceptional cultural immersion into the unique narrative of Danish royalty.
highlights: Exclusive Journey: Enjoy a group tour of Rosenborg Palace.
Explore Renaissance Majesty: Immerse yourself in the rich history of King Christian IV's former royal residence.
Discover Crown Jewels: Uncover the secrets and captivating stories behind Denmark's royal treasures.
Wander Lush Gardens: Stroll through the beautiful gardens surrounding this iconic landmark.
Intimate Castle Interiors: Journey through the King's masterpiece with a detailed interior tour.
Expert Guidance: Be led by knowledgeable guides revealing royal secrets and narratives.
rosenborgCastleTour.itineraryDescription:
Our tour begins at our convenient meeting point: Øster Voldgade 4A, 1350 København, where you'll easily spot our guide with a distinctive red umbrella at the entrance.

Accompanied by our expert guides, you will discover the secrets of the Danish Crown Jewels, each piece laden with captivating stories and royal secrets. We'll then stroll through the lush gardens that beautifully surround this emblematic palace, offering serene views and a glimpse into royal leisure.

Next, delve into the masterpiece of King Christian IV with an intimate tour through the impressive interiors of the castle. You'll explore fascinating collections and chambers, each revealing more about Denmark's royal past. This private journey allows you to fully immerse yourself in the unique narrative of Danish royalty, providing a truly exceptional and personalized cultural experience.
included: Professional English-speaking Expert Tour Guide.
Admission to Rosenborg Palace (including access to the Crown Jewels and castle interiors).
Guided walk through the Rosenborg Castle Gardens.
notIncluded: Transportation to/from the meeting point (unless specified otherwise).
rosenborgCastleTour.title: Rosenborg Castle Guided Tour

malmoExcursion.aboutTourDescription: Discover the fascinating city of Malmö, Sweden's third largest city, on an exciting tour designed to immerse you in its charming streets and rich history! This guided experience offers a comprehensive exploration of Malmö's highlights, from its historic center to iconic landmarks like the Slottsmöllan (Dutch Windmill). You'll admire the impressive architecture of Malmö Town Hall and Malmöhus Castle, and truly immerse yourself in the local culture as we stroll through its historic squares and visit the venerable St. Peter's Church. Join us on this journey filled with nature, captivating architecture, and fascinating stories, providing a unique perspective on Malmö's heritage and modern life.
highlights: Cross the Iconic Øresund Bridge: Experience the impressive journey by train from Copenhagen to Malmö.
Explore Historic Malmöhus Castle: Delve into the rich past of this ancient fortress.
Visit St. Peter's Church: Discover one of Malmö's oldest and most significant churches.
Admire Malmö Town Hall: Witness the imposing architecture of the city's civic heart.
See Slottsmöllan (Dutch Windmill): Capture photos of this famous symbol of Malmö's heritage.
Stroll Through the Charming Old Town: Wander cobbled streets and vibrant, colorful houses.
malmoExcursion.itineraryDescription:
Our adventure begins as we cross the iconic Øresund Bridge by train, offering breathtaking views as we make our way to Sweden. Once in Malmö, we'll immediately immerse ourselves in the city's rich history.

Our journey takes us to the heart of Malmö, where Malmöhus Castle awaits. This ancient fort holds fascinating stories from centuries past, which our guide will bring to life. We'll then walk through history at St. Peter's Church, one of the oldest and most significant churches in the city, admiring its imposing architecture. Next, we'll marvel at the grandeur of Malmö Town Hall, a central piece of the city's historical landscape.

Don't miss the chance to see the famous Dutch windmill, Slottsmöllan, a picturesque symbol of Malmö's enduring heritage. We'll then stroll through the charming old town, with its cobblestone streets and colorful houses, where time seems to stand still amidst its captivating beauty.

Our tour also includes a visit to Malmö Library, a magical place that houses a small castle from 1901, and we'll explore its charming interiors. In addition to immersing ourselves in Malmö's rich history and architecture, you'll have free time to savor the local cuisine during lunch, allowing you to experience the city at your own pace.
included: Professional English-speaking Tour Guide.
Interactive Map (digital access) for easy navigation.
24-hour Public Transport Ticket for seamless travel between Copenhagen and Malmö, and within Malmö.
Admission tickets to St. Peter's Church and Malmö Library.
notIncluded: Entrance fees to other attractions (unless specified).
malmoExcursion.title: Excursion to Malmö Sweden

amalienborgPalace.aboutTourDescription: Prepare to step inside the actual home of the Danish monarchy. Amalienborg is not just a museum; it is the active winter residence of the Royal Family. On this tour, we will take you beyond the Rococo façade to discover how the kings and queens of Denmark have lived for over 250 years.
highlights: Imperial Treasures: Access to the fascinating Fabergé Chamber, featuring one of the world's most significant collections of Russian jewelry.
Royal Life: A walk through the private and state rooms of former kings and queens.
Living History: Discover the secrets of the Rococo complex, which has been home to Danish royalty for over 250 years.
Royal Ceremony: Opportunity to witness the famous Changing of the Royal Guard (if the tour coincides with the 12:00 PM schedule).
amalienborgPalace.itineraryDescription:
Our adventure begins in the grand Octagonal Square, the heart of Amalienborg. As we admire the symmetry of the four twin palaces, your expert guide will share how a tragic fire forced the Royal Family to convert this complex of noble homes into their permanent residence.

With your entry ticket already included, we will proceed directly into the Amalienborg Museum (housed in Christian VIII's Palace). Once inside, we embark on a journey through time, exploring the preserved rooms, from the private offices of former monarchs to the grand reception spaces. You will see firsthand what royal life was like, with intact furniture, personal items, and historical decorations.

We will continue through the most significant rooms, such as the majestic Pompeii Room and the elegant Queen Louise's Salon. We will conclude the visit in the spectacular Fabergé Chamber, where wealth and history meet in the form of exquisite Russian imperial goldsmithing, linked by family ties to the Danish crown.

After approximately an hour and a half, the tour concludes inside the palace, leaving you with a personal understanding of this enduring European dynasty.
included: Expert English-speaking guide.
Entrance ticket to the Amalienborg Museum (Christian VIII's Palace).
Access to the historical rooms and the Fabergé Chamber.
Small group experience.
notIncluded: Public transportation (the tour is on foot).
Entrance to the other three palaces (private use).
amalienborgPalace.title: Amalienborg Palace

christiansborgPalace.aboutTourDescription: Discover the imposing Christiansborg Palace, a cornerstone of Danish history and the symbolic seat of power in Copenhagen. This 1.5-hour guided  tour is a deep dive into the dual role of the palace as both the engine of modern Danish democracy and the opulent stage for the monarchy. You will explore the majestic Royal Reception Rooms, still used for state functions, and stand in the historic Throne Room. The tour’s centerpiece is the impressive Great Tapestry Hall, where monumental tapestries visually narrate Denmark’s history. This experience offers a perfect, concentrated blend of luxury, history, and political insight, designed for travelers who seek a deep, efficient understanding of the Danish state.
highlights: Seat of Power: Explore the palace where the three branches of the Danish government (Executive, Legislative, and Judicial) converge.
Royal Grandeur: Gain private access to the luxurious Royal Reception Rooms and the historic Throne Room, still used for official royal ceremonies.
The Tapestry Hall: Admire the majestic Great Tapestries, unique works of art that chronicle 1,000 years of Danish history.
Insider Access: Immerse yourself in centuries of royal history and political life with the insights of a local expert.
christiansborgPalace.itineraryDescription: This 1.5 hours tour begins immediately upon meeting your guide at Christiansborg Palace. The exploration starts in the magnificent Royal Reception Rooms, where your guide will share stories of state events and royal history. We then move to the stunning Great Tapestry Hall to appreciate the monumental artworks depicting 1,000 years of Danish history, before concluding with access to the historical Throne Room. The guided portion of the tour concludes inside the palace, leaving you perfectly situated to continue exploring other areas, like the Tower or the Royal Stables, on your own.
included: Expert Guide for the full 1.5-hour duration.
Ticket Entry for Christiansborg Palace.
Expertly Guided Access to the Royal Reception Rooms, the Throne Room, and the Great Tapestry Hall.
notIncluded: Gratuities or tips for your private guide.
christiansborgPalace.title: Christiansborg Palace

copenhagenEssentials.aboutTourDescription: Discover the heart of Copenhagen in 2.5 hours. This tour combines a historic walk through the city center with a ride on the local electric ferry. From the secrets of the Carlsberg family to iconic landmarks like The Little Mermaid and Nyhavn, we explore the city authentically. We’ll finish at Amalienborg Palace to witness the traditional Changing of the Guards ceremony.
highlights: Copenhagen’s Top Icons: Explore the city’s must-sees, from the colorful waterfront of Nyhavn and The Little Mermaid to the historic Kastellet fortress.
Electric Ferry: Cross the harbor like a local on a sustainable boat and discover unique tales of the Carlsberg legacy.
Royal Guard Finale: Enjoy a dynamic 2.5-hour route that culminates with the traditional Changing of the Guards ceremony at Amalienborg Palace.
copenhagenEssentials.itineraryDescription: Our adventure begins at the vibrant City Hall Square, right next to the iconic Dragon Fountain, the beating heart of Copenhagen. From there, we’ll make our way towards the Glyptotek area to uncover the fascinating history of the Carlsberg family and also the unique Dante Plads square. After exploring the Old Town and admiring the majesty of Christiansborg Palace and the historic Old Library, we’ll head to the water. We’ll board a local electric ferry for a scenic harbour crossing, enjoying privileged views of the Black Diamond library, the Opera House, and the colourful Nyhavn waterfront from the sea. Once we reach the northern shore, we’ll stroll through the star-shaped Kastellet fortress to meet the legendary Little Mermaid. Finally, we’ll walk to Amalienborg Palace square, arriving just in time to experience the excitement of the Changing of the Guards ceremony—the perfect grand finale to our journey.
included: Professional guide in English.
Ticket for the local electric harbour ferry.
notIncluded: Entrance tickets to palace or museum interiors.
copenhagenEssentials.title: Copenhagen Essentials: Old Town, Harbour Ferry & Royal Guards
copenhagenEssentials.imageAlt: Copenhagen Essentials: Old Town, Harbour Ferry & Royal Guards

jewishQuarter.aboutTourDescription:
This private 3-hour walking tour is an in-depth exploration of the unique and often hopeful history of the Jewish community in Copenhagen. While the Jewish experience across Europe has been turbulent, Denmark stands out for its extraordinary unity during World War II.

Led by your expert guide, you will walk through the Old Town, tracing the historic Jewish Quarter, the area around the Great Synagogue, and past key landmarks associated with the 1943 rescue—a defining moment of national resistance. The tour culminates with skip-the-line admission and a focused visit to the Danish Jewish Museum, allowing you to seamlessly connect the stories from the street with the artifacts and architecture inside. This is a respectful, intimate journey designed for a deep, personalized understanding of the community's heritage and the remarkable chapter known as The Golden Escape.
highlights: Architectural Heritage: Explore the historic Jewish Quarter and admire the distinct, Moorish-revival exterior of the Great Synagogue.
Museum Deep Dive: Gain immediate skip-the-line access to the renowned Danish Jewish Museum for a focused, guided visit through its unique collection.
Bespoke Insights: Understand the unique moral courage of the Danish population that sets this chapter of European Jewish history apart.
jewishQuarter.itineraryDescription: Explore the rich history of the Jewish Quarter in Copenhagen on this private walking tour. Begin your journey at Kongens Nytorv close to Nyhavn. Then admire the Great Synagogue with its striking Moorish-revival design, then stroll through the Old Town to uncover the story of Jewish migration and the bravery of the Danish community during WWII. Visit the Danish Jewish Museum with skip-the-line access, where your expert guide will share insights on the architecture and significant artifacts. Conclude with a personalized Q&A session, receiving recommendations for kosher dining and shops to enhance your experience in Jewish Copenhagen. - Private tour lasting 3 hours with an expert guide - Skip-the-Line entry to the Danish Jewish Museum included - Focused exploration of the Jewish Quarter and key historical sites.
included: Private Expert Guide for the entire 3-hour duration.
Skip-the-Line Entry/Admission to the Danish Jewish Museum (Tickets are fully covered in the price).
A focused, guided walking tour through the historic Jewish Quarter and Old Town landmarks.
Personalized recommendations for the best of Jewish Copenhagen, including tips on shops and kosher dining.
notIncluded: Entry to the Great Synagogue (due to security requirements, access is not permitted on this tour).
Any costs for food, beverages, or personal shopping (unless a coffee/pastry break is specifically negotiated and included in the price).
Public transportation tickets (this is a walking tour).
Gratuities or tips for your private guide.
jewishQuarter.title: Jewish Quarter and Danish Jewish Museum Tour
jewishQuarter.imageAlt: Jewish Quarter and Danish Jewish Museum Tour

tivoliGardensEntry.aboutTourDescription: Make the most of your stay in the Danish capital with this 2-hour guided walking tour followed by a visit to the world-famous Tivoli Gardens. From the city’s medieval roots to its royal splendor, you’ll discover the landmarks that make Copenhagen unique, ending with skip-the-line access to one of the oldest amusement parks in the world.
highlights: Enjoy the best of the Old Town in 2 hours.
Start at the historic harbor Nyhavn and finish exactly at the gates of Tivoli Gardens with your skip-the-line tickets in hand.
Discover the impressive exterior and courtyards of Christiansborg Palace, the seat of the Danish Parliament.
tivoliGardensEntry.itineraryDescription:
Our tour begins at the world-famous Nyhavn, the vibrant 17th-century waterfront. After admiring the historic ships and townhouses, we’ll take a short walk to Amalienborg Palace (the Royal residence) and the magnificent Marble Church.

Next, we’ll head towards the grand Kongens Nytorv square and the Royal Theatre, moving into the heart of the city to see the historic Bourse (Stock Exchange) and the majestic Christiansborg Palace, home to the Danish Parliament.

The journey concludes at the City Hall Square (Rådhuspladsen). Located just steps away from the main entrance of Tivoli Gardens, your guide will hand over your admission tickets so you can explore the park’s magic at your own pace.
included: Expert Tour Guide for the dedicated 2-hour interactive walking tour.
Skip-the-Line Admission to Tivoli Gardens (valid for all-day use after the tour concludes).
A custom-designed walking route covering Copenhagen’s most iconic, family-friendly landmarks.
notIncluded: Rides, Games, or Food inside Tivoli Gardens (only the admission ticket is included).
Meals, snacks, or beverages during the 2-hour walking tour.
Entry into any buildings along the walking route (e.g., inside the Round Tower or Palaces).
Public transportation tickets (this is a walking tour).
Gratuities or tips for your tour guide.
tivoliGardensEntry.title: Copenhagen Walking Tour + Tivoli Gardens Entry
tivoliGardensEntry.imageAlt: Copenhagen Walking Tour + Tivoli Gardens Entry

boatTour.aboutTourDescription: Want to experience Copenhagen's stunning harbor in a truly unique way? Our luxury boat tours are just the ticket! Glide across the water in complete silence, leaving the hustle and bustle of the city behind as you soak up the majestic harbor scenery. Our eco-friendly electric boats are perfect for exploring year-round. Relax on the spacious, comfortable deck, furnished with cozy sofas and tables, while your expert captain guides you on an unforgettable journey. This tour is designed to offer a tranquil yet captivating exploration of Copenhagen's aquatic charm.
highlights: Eco-Friendly Electric Boats: Glide silently through Copenhagen's waters on modern, sustainable vessels.
Escape the City Bustle: Experience serene tranquility on the water, leaving urban noise behind.
Comfort & Style: Relax on spacious decks with cozy sofas and tables.
Expert Captain: Enjoy an unforgettable journey guided by a knowledgeable professional.
Iconic Landmarks: See the Little Mermaid, Opera House, Black Diamond, and Cirkelbroen Bridge from a unique perspective.
Tailored Experiences: Perfect for romantic escapes, celebrations, or unique corporate events.
boatTour.itineraryDescription:
Our adventure begins and ends at the Gammel Strand pier, located in Copenhagen's vibrant harbor district. From there, your expert skipper will take you on a 2 hours cruise, venturing off the beaten tourist trail to discover hidden gems in secret coves and enchanting canals.

You'll experience the city from a unique water perspective, visiting iconic landmarks such as The Little Mermaid, the impressive Copenhagen Opera House, the striking Black Diamond (Royal Danish Library), and the innovative Cirkelbroen Bridge. Almost anything is possible! Whether you're looking for a romantic escape, an exciting celebration, or a unique corporate event, our boat trips can be tailored to your specific needs. And you can always extend the duration for an even longer, more personalized experience!
included: Private luxury electric boat rental for minimum 2 hours.
Experienced and knowledgeable Captain/Skipper.
Comfortable seating with sofas and tables on deck.
Eco-friendly and silent cruising experience.
Opportunity to customize the route (up to the 5 hours).
notIncluded: Meals and beverages (feel free to bring your own or inquire about catering options).
Entrance fees to attractions (as this is a sightseeing tour from the water).
boatTour.title: Copenhagen Private Boat Tour: Hidden Gems & Hygge
boatTour.imageAlt: Copenhagen Private Boat Tour: Hidden Gems & Hygge

royalDeerParkBikeTour.aboutTourDescription: Embark on a truly magical journey through Dyrehaven, the Royal Deer Park, just a short ride from Copenhagen. This tour is designed to immerse you in the tranquility of nature and the grandeur of Danish history. You'll glide along hidden paths on comfortable e-bikes, encountering graceful deer and breathtaking landscapes. Our expert guide will reveal the park's most enchanting corners, from its peaceful inhabitants to the historic Hermitage Hunting Lodge, ensuring an unforgettable experience that blends outdoor adventure with royal heritage.
highlights: E-Bike Adventure: Explore Dyrehaven's secret trails on an exciting 2-hour e-bike tour.
Encounter Wild Deer: Pedal through ancient forests alongside gracefully grazing deer.
Discover The Hermitage Hunting Lodge: Uncover the enchanting corners of the royal park with your expert guide.
Admire Arne Jacobsen's Lifeguard Tower: Visit this iconic architectural masterpiece.
Seamless Travel: Enjoy a comfortable 30-minute train journey to Klampenborg and back.
Nature & History Blend: Immerse yourself in dreamlike landscapes and fascinating royal history.
royalDeerParkBikeTour.itineraryDescription:
Our adventure begins as we meet our guide at Copenhagen Central Station. In just 30 minutes by train, we'll be immersed in the tranquility of Klampenborg, the gateway to Dyrehaven.

Upon arrival, our e-bikes will be waiting, ready to take us on an exciting 2-hour tour through the secret trails of Dyrehaven. Imagine pedaling through ancient forests, surrounded by peacefully grazing deer, a truly serene experience. Our expert guide will reveal the park's most enchanting corners, from the deer's favorite spots to the majestic Hermitage Hunting Lodge, making it an unforgettable journey.

After our cycling adventure, you'll have free time to enjoy a delicious lunch (not included) or even visit the iconic Lifeguard Tower designed by Arne Jacobsen, an architectural work of art that will transport us to another era.

To end this perfect day, we'll return to Copenhagen by train, recharged and with lasting memories of Dyrehaven's natural beauty and royal charm.
included: Professional Tour Guide.
E-bike rental for the 2-hour park tour.
All train tickets for round-trip travel between Copenhagen Central Station and Klampenborg.
Access to Dyrehaven Royal Deer Park.
notIncluded: Entrance fees to attractions (unless explicitly specified).
royalDeerParkBikeTour.title: Hermitage Palace & Royal Deer Park Bike Tour
royalDeerParkBikeTour.imageAlt: Hermitage Palace & Royal Deer Park Bike Tour

harborArchitecture.aboutTourDescription: Discover Copenhagen's architecture on a 2-hour guided tour. See Nyhavn's colorful houses and Cirkelbroen's innovative design and explore the Papiroen and the unique Operaen building on the waterfront.
highlights: Explore the stunning architecture of Copenhagen's harbor in this 2-hour tour.
Discover why Copenhagen was World Capital of Architecture 2023.
Don't miss this chance to experience Copenhagen stunning waterfronts.
harborArchitecture.itineraryDescription:
Embark on a fascinating 2-hour Private architecture tour of Copenhagen's vibrant harbor area, and explore the unique architecture of Nyhavn, Papiroen, Operaen, Cirkelbroen and Dac. This tour is perfect for those looking to learn more about the rich new arquitecture of Copenhagen and experience its modern developments.

Begin your tour at Ofelia Plads close to the iconic Nyhavn, a 17th-century waterfront district filled with colorful houses and lively restaurants. Your guide will lead you on a leisurely stroll along the canals, sharing insights into the area's history and architecture. You'll learn about the district's origins as a bustling port and hear stories about the famous artists and writers who once called Nyhavn home.

Next, head to the new neighborhood of Papiroen, which was once a paper mill but has since been transformed into a vibrant oasis. Admire the unique architecture of the market's buildings and the stunning views of the harbor. You'll learn about the development of the area and the efforts to preserve its industrial heritage while creating a modern urban space.

Enjoy the view of Operaen, a modern building located on the waterfront that boasts a distinctive design. The building was completed in 2005 and has quickly become a landmark of Copenhagen's cultural scene. Your guide will share the story of the building's architecture, which was inspired by the surrounding harbor and the cultural heritage of Denmark.

Next, make your way to Cirkelbroen, a pedestrian bridge that features an innovative design inspired by the circles of life. This bridge is both functional and beautiful, connecting the harbor's two sides while creating a unique architectural experience.

Throughout the tour, your guide will provide you with fascinating insights into the history, culture, and architecture of Copenhagen's harbor. You'll also have plenty of opportunities to take stunning photos and soak in the beauty of this dynamic city.

This 2-hour architecture tour is an excellent way to experience Copenhagen's rich cultural heritage and stunning waterfront views. Whether you're a history buff or simply interested in the city's modern developments, this tour is sure to leave you with a new appreciation for Copenhagen's unique architecture and urban landscape.
included: Guide.
Walking tour.
harborArchitecture.title: Copenhagen: Harbor Architecture Private Walking Tour
harborArchitecture.imageAlt: Copenhagen: Harbor Architecture Private Walking Tour

rosenborgCastleCanalCruise.aboutTourDescription: Embark on a magical journey through the heart of Danish royal legacy with our exclusive 2-hour tour of the majestic Rosenborg Palace in Copenhagen. This private experience is designed to immerse you in the rich history of this Renaissance jewel, once the cherished royal residence of the beloved King Christian IV. Our tour promises an exceptional and personalized cultural immersion into the unique narrative of Danish royalty.
highlights: Exclusive Journey: Enjoy an intimate, personalized tour of Rosenborg Palace.
Explore Renaissance Majesty: Immerse yourself in the rich history of King Christian IV's former royal residence.
Discover Crown Jewels: Uncover the secrets and captivating stories behind Denmark's royal treasures.
Wander Lush Gardens: Stroll through the beautiful gardens surrounding this iconic landmark.
Intimate Castle Interiors: Journey through the King's masterpiece with a detailed interior tour.
Expert Guidance: Be led by knowledgeable guides revealing royal secrets and narratives.
rosenborgCastleCanalCruise.itineraryDescription:
Our tour begins at our convenient meeting point: Øster Voldgade 4A, 1350 København, where you'll easily spot our guide with a distinctive red umbrella at the entrance.

Accompanied by our expert guides, you will discover the secrets of the Danish Crown Jewels, each piece laden with captivating stories and royal secrets. We'll then stroll through the lush gardens that beautifully surround this emblematic palace, offering serene views and a glimpse into royal leisure.

Next, delve into the masterpiece of King Christian IV with an intimate tour through the impressive interiors of the castle. You'll explore fascinating collections and chambers, each revealing more about Denmark's royal past. This private journey allows you to fully immerse yourself in the unique narrative of Danish royalty, providing a truly exceptional and personalized cultural experience.

We will finish the tour at Nyhavn, with ticket for the canal tour.
included: Professional English-speaking Expert Tour Guide.
Admission to Rosenborg Palace (including access to the Crown Jewels and castle interiors).
Guided walk through the Rosenborg Castle Gardens.
Canal Tour 1 - hour included from Nyhavn.
notIncluded: Transportation to/from the meeting point (unless specified otherwise)
rosenborgCastleCanalCruise.title: Skip the Line to Rosenborg Castle and Canal Cruise
rosenborgCastleCanalCruise.imageAlt: Skip the Line to Rosenborg Castle and Canal Cruise

frederiksborgAndKronborgCastle.aboutTourDescription: Enjoy a comprehensive and scenic 8-hour excursion starting and ending in Copenhagen. This tour offers a deep dive into Danish royal history and architectural grandeur. You will travel through the picturesque landscapes of North Sealand to explore two of Denmark's most essential historical sites. The journey connects you to literary history at the Hamlet site (Helsingør) and introduces you to the stunning Renaissance architecture and lavish interiors of Frederiksborg Palace.
highlights: Kronborg Castle (Helsingør): Step into the magnificent setting of Shakespeare's great tragedy, Hamlet. Explore the formidable coastal fortress that guarded Denmark's trade routes.
Frederiksborg Castle (Hillerød): Visit one of the most representative and impressive Danish Renaissance palaces, often referred to as the "Versailles of the North."
North Sealand Scenic Drive: Enjoy a beautiful, relaxing drive through the scenic forests and affluent coastal towns north of Copenhagen.
frederiksborgAndKronborgCastle.itineraryDescription:
Meet your guide at Nørreport Station.

We will board the train for a scenic 50-minute journey to Hillerød, the town hosting our first royal destination.

Guided visit: Begin the day at the magnificent Frederiksborg Palace (ticket included). We will explore the opulent chapel, the Great Hall, and the royal chambers of this iconic Renaissance castle, often called the “Versailles of the North.”

Transfer to coast
Travel: Board the train for a brief 35-minute transfer to the coastal town of Helsingør, where the legendary Kronborg Castle awaits.

Free time: Break for lunch in the charming medieval harbor town of Helsingør. Your guide will recommend local spots for a quick, enjoyable meal or a coffee break near the water.

Kronborg Castle (Hamlet)
Guided visit: Enter the formidable UNESCO World Heritage site of Kronborg Castle (ticket included). We will delve into its strategic maritime history and the legend that ties this fortress to Shakespeare’s Hamlet, exploring the Royal Chambers and the famed Casemates.

Coastal views & buffer
Free time (15 mins): Short time for photos of the Øresund, the strait separating Denmark and Sweden, before heading back to the station.

Departure for Copenhagen
Travel: Board the direct regional train back to Copenhagen. The journey is approximately 50 to 60 minutes.

Arrive back at Nørreport.
included: All Transport Tickets for the scenic round trip from Copenhagen (public transport is included).
Entrance Tickets for access to both Palaces (Frederiksborg Castle and Kronborg Castle).
Local Tour guide.
notIncluded: Gratuity or tips for the guide.
Any extra purchases made during the stops (e.g., souvenirs).
frederiksborgAndKronborgCastle.title: North Copenhagen: Frederiksborg & Kronborg Castle - Hamlet
frederiksborgAndKronborgCastle.imageAlt: North Copenhagen: Frederiksborg & Kronborg Castle - Hamlet

foodTours.aboutTourDescription: Discover Copenhagen through its flavors on this carefully curated 3-hour food tour. Starting in Nyhavn and ending near Nørreport, the experience takes guests through some of the city’s most loved food stops, combining iconic Danish dishes with the stories, traditions, and local culture behind them. Along the way, guests taste five food and drink pairings, including a gourmet cinnamon bun from a bakery founded by a former Noma baker, an award-winning Danish hot dog, classic smørrebrød with a paired drink, traditional frikadelle, and a sweet flødeboller to finish. The tour offers a guided introduction to Danish cuisine in the heart of Copenhagen.
highlights: A Taste of Noma: Begin your tour with an exquisite croissant from a renowned bakery founded by a former Noma baker.
Award-Winning Hot Dog: Savor a true culinary delight at DØP Ristet Hotdog, a spot that has been awarded "Best Restaurant" and features a gold medal-winning sausage.
Historic Smørrebrød: Enjoy an authentic Danish lunch of traditional Smørrebrød in a one-of-a-kind setting—a former church.
Local Favorite Frikadelle: Experience a genuine local flavor by trying frikadelle at a market, a dish praised by Danes as the best.
foodTours.itineraryDescription:
Try 5 food and drink combinations at different traditional Copenhagen restaurants. Try dishes like Ristepølse and Smørrebrod with beers, plus a typical Danish dessert.


Embark on a delicious culinary journey through Copenhagen with our exclusive Local Flavors Tour! We'll start at a renowned bakery founded by a former Noma baker, to delight in the exquisite croissant.


Then, we'll head to DØP Ristet Hotdog, awarded Best Restaurant in 2010, for a unique experience with the famous sausage, awarded a gold medal for organic food. This hot dog is a true culinary delight.


We'll continue our journey into the world of Smørrebrød, a typical Danish dish, in a former church where we'll explore the history of this Danish dish. Drinks are included.


Afterwards, we'll head to one of the markets. We'll try the classic frikadelle, accompanied by remoulade and rugbrød. Praised as the best by Danes, this dish will provide an authentic and delicious experience.


We'll conclude our tour with a sweet treat: flødeboller, a chocolate marshmallow-filled dessert. A luxurious dessert made with the highest-quality organic ingredients.


Discover the rich history and unique flavors of Danish cuisine on this carefully curated food tour. Book now and let your taste buds savor the culinary essence of Copenhagen!
included: A private, English-speaking guide to lead your culinary journey.
A gourmet croissant from a renowned bakery.
An award-winning Danish hot dog (Ristepølse).
A traditional Smørrebrød (open-faced sandwich), served with a paired drink.
A classic Frikadelle (Danish meatball) with remoulade and rugbrød.
A Flødeboller, a traditional Danish dessert.
notIncluded: Transportation to/from the meeting point (unless specified otherwise)
foodTours.title: Food Tours

roskilde.aboutTourDescription:
Explore the original Viking capital of Denmark on this essential private excursion, located just a short, scenic train ride from Copenhagen. Unlike standard tours, your experience is entirely managed by an expert local guide, ensuring a relaxed and enriching day that caters exclusively to your group's pace and interests.

We will immerse you in the rich Viking history at the famous Viking Ship Museum, where children (and adults!) can have fun dressing up and boarding authentic Viking ships. Afterward, your guide will lead you through the impressive Roskilde Cathedral, where we explore the burial site of Danish kings and queens, providing deep insight into the country's royal lineage. This private tour is the perfect combination of culture, entertainment, and learning, guaranteeing an unforgettable day trip.
highlights: Viking Ship Immersion: Explore the five original Viking ships from the 11th century and engage in family-friendly games and interactive exhibits at the museum.
Royal Grandeur: Discover the breathtaking Roskilde Cathedral—a UNESCO World Heritage Site—and trace the fascinating history of the Danish monarchy by visiting the royal tombs.
Seamless Logistics: Enjoy a completely private, all-inclusive experience where your guide manages all transport and ticket entry, maximizing your time for exploration.
roskilde.itineraryDescription:
Meet your private guide at the main entrance of Copenhagen Central Station. Enjoy a comfortable, direct train journey (tickets included) to the historic city of Roskilde.

Viking ImmersionViking Ship Museum: Your guide facilitates quick entry (tickets included). Explore the five original 11th-century ships and have plenty of time for interactive, family-friendly activities and learning about Norse maritime life.

Lunch BreakFree Time: Enjoy a leisurely break for lunch or a quick coffee in the charming harbor area of Roskilde (meals not included).

Danish RoyaltyRoskilde Cathedral (UNESCO): Guided visit (ticket included) to the magnificent brick Cathedral. Your expert will detail the history of the Danish monarchy and the elaborate royal tombs housed within.

Return to CopenhagenA brief, scenic walk through Roskilde's historic center before boarding the regional train back to Copenhagen Central Station, where the tour concludes.
included: Private Expert Guide for the full 4 hours.
All Train Tickets (Round trip to Roskilde from Copenhagen).
Entrance Ticket to the Viking Ship Museum.
Entrance Ticket to Roskilde Cathedral.
notIncluded: Gratuity or tips for the guide.
roskilde.title: Roskilde: Old Viking City

nordhavnArchitecture.aboutTourDescription: This 90-minute walking tour of the innovative Nordhavn district focuses on sustainable urban transformation. Explore the bold blend of restored industrial architecture and new, minimalist luxury buildings right on the water's edge, offering unique panoramic vistas of the city. Discover how Danes integrate design and functionality into their daily lives, transforming a former port into a vibrant, pioneering community.
highlights: Vanguard Design: See the bold blend of restored industrial architecture and new, minimalist luxury buildings right on the water's edge.
Panoramic Vistas: Enjoy unique views of the harbor and the Copenhagen skyline from unusual vantage points.
Danish Urban Life: Understand how Danes integrate design, functionality, and community in their daily lives in this pioneering new neighborhood.
nordhavnArchitecture.itineraryDescription:
Our 90-minute route focuses on the first phase of Nordhavn's development, highlighting its transformation:


Århusgade Quarter


The heart of Nordhavn. We explore the first completed residential buildings, understanding the concept of urban "islands" and the creative reuse of warehouse structures.


Frihavnstårnet (The Free Port Tower)


Former grain silos converted into stunning, modern waterfront apartments. An iconic example of architectural adaptive reuse.


Konditaget Lüders (The Fitness Rooftop)


We visit this unique public park located on the roof of a multi-story car park. A brilliant example of functional space, offering a playground, fitness equipment, and panoramic views.


Götenborg Plads


One of the district's central and most vibrant squares, examining the surrounding architecture and community life.


Harbour Bath (Havnebadet)


We observe the new public swimming areas and water access points, an essential element of Copenhagen's coastal lifestyle.
included: Expert English Tour Guide.
notIncluded: Transportation: The tour is conducted entirely on foot.
nordhavnArchitecture.title: Nordhavn Architecture

christmasTour.aboutTourDescription: Experience the magic of Christmas in Copenhagen on this cozy 90-minute private tour filled with festive lights, Danish traditions, and seasonal flavors. Starting at City Hall Square, you’ll explore some of the city’s most charming Christmas markets with a local guide, while discovering the stories and customs that make Danish Christmas so special. Along the way, you’ll enjoy classic holiday treats like æbleskiver and gløgg, taste a traditional julebryg, and even create your own Hans Christian Andersen paper heart as a memorable keepsake. The experience ends with included entry to Tivoli Gardens, so you can continue enjoying one of Copenhagen’s most iconic Christmas settings at your own pace.
highlights: Immerse yourself in the warm and welcoming Danish Christmas "hygge" atmosphere
Unleash your creativity by crafting the iconic "Hans Christian Andersen hearts"
Taste the delicious Æbleskiver and Gløgg.
Discover the main Christmas Markets in the city.
Tivoli Ticket INCLUDED!
christmasTour.itineraryDescription:
Join our expert guide for a 1.5-hour tour filled with festive magic, delicious tastings, and an immersion into Danish Christmas traditions. Discover the enchanting streets of Copenhagen as they come alive with holiday decorations and glittering lights, all while indulging in the flavors of the season.


Explore Copenhagen's enchanting Christmas scene. Hear captivating stories about the city's Christmas heritage and traditions.


Satisfy your taste buds with Danish holiday classics. Sample "æbleskiver," delightful spherical pancakes, and warm up with a cup of aromatic "gløgg," or choose a comforting hot chocolate. It's a sensory delight that captures the essence of Danish Christmas.


Unleash your creativity with "Hans Christian Andersen hearts." These intricate paper hearts are a cherished Danish tradition, and you'll learn to make your own as a keepsake or gift for loved ones.


The tour culminates with guaranteed, skip-the-line entrance to the world-famous Tivoli Gardens. Your admission ticket is conveniently included in the tour price. This allows you to stay and enjoy the illuminated magic of Tivoli at your own pace for as long as you wish.


Book this private experience for the fastest, most exclusive, and comprehensive way to unlock the true meaning of hygge in a Copenhagen Christmas.
included: Local  guide.
A Julebryg (Christmas beer).
Æbleskiver and Gløgg.
Crafting the iconic "Hans Christian Andersen hearts"
Entrance to Tivoli Garden. ( Entrance only, games not included).
notIncluded: Additional food and drinks or Purchases made at the Christmas market.
christmasTour.title: Private 90-Min Ultimate Christmas: Tivoli & Hygge

panorama.aboutTourDescription: Experience Copenhagen with the exclusivity and comfort you deserve. Designed specifically for cruise travelers group up to ten, this 4 or 5-hour private excursion eliminates the stress of crowds and public transport. From the moment you step off your ship, you are our guest of honor. With a private vehicle and a dedicated expert guide, you will discover the city’s royal legacy and modern charm at your own pace, ensuring a seamless and punctual return to the pier.
highlights: Private pick-up and drop-off at your ship’s gangway—no walking required to start your day.
A private minivan and a professional guide dedicated solely to your group of up to 10 guests.
Perfect photo opportunities at The Little Mermaid, Nyhavn, and Rosenborg Castle.
Expertly timed logistics to ensure you are back on board with time to spare.
panorama.itineraryDescription:
Your tour begins at 10:30 AM with a private greeting at the cruise terminal. From the pier, your chauffeur will escort you to the northern waterfront to visit the poetic Little Mermaid and the grand Gefion Fountain. The journey continues into the Royal Quarter, where you will explore the majestic courtyard of Amalienborg Palace and the imposing Marble Church. 

Then you will enjoy a stroll through the colorful 17th-century harbor of Nyhavn. The tour then transitions into a panoramic drive past the Parliament at Christiansborg Palace. Your final cultural stop brings you to the gates of the Dutch Renaissance Rosenborg Castle, set within the lush King’s Gardens. The afternoon concludes with a scenic drive back through the city's historic center, ensuring you are comfortably settled back at your terminal by 3:30 PM.
included: Professional English-speaking guide for the full four or five-hour duration.
Private premium minivan and professional chauffeur.
Direct pick-up and drop-off at the cruise pier.
All fuel, parking fees, and local taxes.
Our official Back-to-Ship timing guarantee.
notIncluded: Entrance tickets for interior museum visits.
Optional gratuities for the guide and chauffeur.
panorama.title: Copenhagen Panorama: Private Shore-to-City Experience

shoreExcursion.aboutTourDescription: Experience Copenhagen at its most authentic. This 4-hour small group excursion is specifically designed for cruise passengers who prefer the personal touch of a walking tour over a bus window. Your experience begins the moment you step off the ship, as your guide meets you close the cruise port. We combine the city’s iconic "must-see" landmarks with hidden medieval alleys and local secrets, all while teaching you the true meaning of Danish Hygge. By using the city’s efficient public transit, you’ll travel like a local and maximize your time in the historic heart of the capital.
highlights: Your guide meets you directly at the  OrientkajMetro Terminal (M4) just 10 minutes by bus from the Cruise Terminal.
Unlike standard 3-hour tours, our extra hour allows for a relaxed pace, hidden historic courtyards, and a deep dive into the Danish "Hygge" lifestyle.
Traveling with kids? Children under 12 join for free. This makes it the most cost-effective and welcoming private experience for families.
Experience Copenhagen like a local by exploring the city on foot and using our world-class green public transport system.
shoreExcursion.itineraryDescription:
You will then enjoy a guided metro ride straight into the historic heart of Copenhagen.

The walking portion starts at Gammel Strand, the city’s ancient shore, offering stunning views of Christiansborg Palace, the seat of the Danish Parliament.

As you move toward the city center, you will stroll through the vibrant Kongens Nytorv square and the charming medieval streets that define the capital’s character.

The route then leads you to the iconic Nyhavn canal, famous for its 17th-century colorful townhouses and historic wooden ships.

From there, you will proceed to the royal quarter to admire Amalienborg Palace and the impressive Marble Church.

After a peaceful walk through the King’s Garden, with views of the Renaissance Rosenborg Castle, your guide will escort you back to the Oceankaj pier, ensuring you return comfortably and on time for your ship’s departure.
included: Dedicated service from a professional English-speaking expert.
Personal meet-and-greet directly at the Orientkaj terminal metro.
Children under 12 join for free (up to 2 kids per adult).
Insider tips on Danish culture, "Hygge", and the best local spots.
All public transport tickets (bus/metro) required for the tour are covered.
notIncluded: Any snacks, coffee, or meals during the 4-hour walk.
Admission to the interior of museums or palaces.
This is a walking tour using public transit; no private car or minivan is provided.
Tips for your guide (optional but appreciated).
shoreExcursion.title: Copenhagen Walking Shore Excursion: From Metro Orientkaj to the Heart of the City
shoreExcursion.imageAlt: Copenhagen Walking Shore Excursion: From Metro Orientkaj to the Heart of the City

copenhagenCityToCoast.aboutTourDescription: Discover the perfect transition from Copenhagen’s historic heart to its gritty, modern soul. This 3-hour experience takes you from the iconic City Hall Square, through hidden royal gardens and world-class architecture like the Black Diamond, before boarding a scenic Harbor Cruise. We dock directly at Reffen Street Food just as the music and sunset vibes kick in, leaving you perfectly positioned to enjoy the city’s best global flavors.
highlights: We journey from the historic grandeur of City Hall and Slotsholmen to the ultra-modern waterfront, featuring the glass-and-granite Black Diamond and the artistic Circle Bridge by Olafur Eliasson.

Instead of a long walk through industrial areas, we board the Havnebus for a scenic 20-minute navigation. This offers "front-row seats" to Nyhavn, the Royal Playhouse, and the Opera House from the water.

We dock directly at Refshaleøen just as the "Golden Hour" begins. Your guide introduces you to the best global street food stalls and hidden corners of Reffen, leaving you to enjoy the city’s most vibrant sunset atmosphere.
copenhagenCityToCoast.itineraryDescription: The journey begins at City Hall Square (Rådhuspladsen), where we explore the historic pulse of the city before walking toward Slotsholmen, the seat of the Danish Parliament. We escape the crowds in the Librarian’s Garden, a secret oasis tucked between the old and the new, before reaching the striking glass-and-granite facade of the Black Diamond. From there, we trace the waterfront to witness the artistic Circle Bridge by Olafur Eliasson and the bohemian Kayak Bar, capturing the best of Copenhagen’s modern "Hygge" culture. Then we will take a  20-minute scenic navigation. The tour concludes as we dock directly at Refshaleøen, where your guide will provide a curated orientation of the best global street food stalls and hidden corners of the Reffen Market just as the evening atmosphere begins to peak and you can enjoy the sunset!
included: Professional 3-hour guided experience with a local expert.
One way ticket for the Havnebus (Harbor Bus).
Personalized orientation/recommendation list for the Reffen Street Food stalls.
notIncluded: Any food, snacks, or beverages purchased at the Reffen market or along the walking route.
copenhagenCityToCoast.title: Copenhagen City to Coast: The Black Diamond, Canal Cruise & Reffen
copenhagenCityToCoast.imageAlt: Copenhagen City to Coast: The Black Diamond, Canal Cruise & Reffen

privateTours.heading: Private Tours & Corporate Experiences
privateTours.description1: Looking for a personalized experience in Copenhagen?
privateTours.description2: We offer private walking tours and corporate experiences tailored to your schedule and interests. Whether you want a historical deep dive, a food-focused adventure or a team-building activity, we create the perfect itinerary just for you.
privateTours.ctaLabel: Contact us to design your private Copenhagen experience

intro.title: Our Corporate Experiences
intro.description: At Walk and Tour Copenhagen, we design corporate experiences that strengthen teams and create memorable moments in the city. From food and beer tastings to private boat tours and creative workshops, every activity can be tailored to your goals.

smorrebrodExperience.aboutTourDescription: An immersive, chef-led cooking experience where you go behind the scenes of Danish gastronomy. You will learn to bake traditional rye bread and master the intricate techniques of assembling "Smørrebrød"—the world-famous Danish open-faced sandwiches.
highlights: Learn directly from our expert chef.
Create 3 delicious types of beautifully decorated sandwiches.
A class designed to satisfy the eye and the taste buds.
Enjoy your meal with a cold beer and traditional Snaps.
smorrebrodExperience.itineraryDescription: Your experience begins with an introduction to the rich history of Danish heritage and the seasonal ingredients that define Nordic flavors. Once in the kitchen, you will jump straight into the action by preparing a variety of traditional toppings, dressings, and garnishes under the guidance of our chef. After the prep work, you will move into the creative phase where you learn the specific techniques required to assemble, stack, and decorate three distinct types of open-faced sandwiches. The session culminates in our dining room, where you will sit down to enjoy the beautiful meal you have prepared, paired with a cold beer and a glass of traditional snaps in a true atmosphere of Danish hygge.
included: Hands-on cooking class with a chef
Ingredients for 3 types of Smørrebrød
A full meal (eat what you've cooked)
Cold Beer or Soda
1 Glass of traditional Snaps
Printable recipes from the day
smorrebrodExperience.title: Danish Smorrebrod Experience

canalBoatTour.aboutTourDescription: This is not a typical pub crawl. It is a cultural journey through Copenhagen’s oldest "Bodegas." You will visit three historic taverns to taste traditional and modern beers while learning the songs, games, and drinking rituals that shaped Danish history.
highlights: Drink from a Viking horn and learn the prehistoric meaning of "Skål."
Taste the iconic 1895 Tuborg recipe in a bar dedicated to the Golden Horns.
Learn the rules of "Beer-Pong" and "Snyd" (dice game) and sing traditional sailor songs.
Finish the tour with a tasting of Mjød (Honey wine) and stories of Viking legends.
canalBoatTour.itineraryDescription: Our journey begins in the heart of the city, signaled by the powerful sound of the Viking "Lura." From there, we dive into a series of carefully selected historic taverns, each representing a different era of Danish history. At each stop, you will taste a specific style of beer—ranging from the iconic "Golden Age" recipes to modern-day award winners. Along the 2km route, your guide will reveal the myths of the Norse gods and the rowdy history of the Danish naval fleet. You will learn the rules of local dice games and join in traditional toasts before concluding the experience with a final, premium tasting of Viking Mead to seal the bond of the group.
included: Expert storytelling led by a local host.
Three distinct beer or specialty shots at historic locations.
Use of traditional drinking horns and ritual instruments during the tour.
A tasting of traditional Viking Mead (Mjød) to close the session.
notIncluded: Any additional beverages ordered outside the scheduled tastings.
The tour is a walking experience; no vehicle transfers are included.
canalBoatTour.title: Canal Boat Tour

highlights: Drink from a Viking horn and learn the prehistoric meaning of "Skål."
Taste the iconic 1895 Tuborg recipe in a bar dedicated to the Golden Horns.
Learn the rules of "Beer-Pong" and "Snyd" (dice game) and sing traditional sailor songs.
Finish the tour with a tasting of Mjød (Honey wine) and stories of Viking legends.

From there, we dive into a series of carefully selected historic taverns, each representing a different era of Danish history. At each stop, you will taste a specific style of beer—ranging from the iconic "Golden Age" recipes to modern-day award winners. Along the 2km route, your guide will reveal the myths of the Norse gods and the rowdy history of the Danish naval fleet. You will learn the rules of local dice games and join in traditional toasts before concluding the experience with a final, premium tasting of Viking Mead to seal the bond of the group.

danishBeerTasting.title: Danish Beer Tasting

danishCollageWorkshop.aboutTourDescription: A creative, hands-on workshop where you learn to blend traditional watercolor techniques with the versatile art of collage.
highlights: Experiment with mixed media including watercolors, vintage magazines, and old photography.
Learn professional composition and watercolor techniques.
Work with high-quality 300gr watercolor paper and a variety of textures.
A peaceful, inspiring environment perfect for bonding.
danishCollageWorkshop.itineraryDescription: Your session begins with an introduction to different artistic styles and watercolor techniques. We will guide you through the basics of composition to help you visualize your masterpiece. Once you feel inspired, you will dive into the practical phase, mixing watercolor washes with a variety of thin papers, old book pages, and vintage photographs. Throughout the workshop, you will experiment with layering, cutting, and gluing to create depth and meaning in your work. The experience concludes with a group gallery moment where everyone can share their creations and the stories behind their unique compositions.
included: All paints, brushes, and specialized tools are provided.
High-quality 300gr watercolor paper for your final piece.
Access to vintage magazines, old book pages, and historic photographs.
Personal guidance on watercolor techniques and composition styles.
You will take home your unique 2.5-hour creation at the end of the session.
notIncluded: Travel to and from the art studio is not provided.
Snacks or drinks are not included in the standard price.
We provide the paper and materials, but frames are not included.
danishCollageWorkshop.title: Collage & Watercolor Workshop: A Creative Journey
danishCollageWorkshop.imageAlt: Collage & Watercolor Workshop: A Creative Journey

intro.title: Curated and authentic experiences
intro.description: Walk and Tour Copenhagen has a steadfast commitment to excellence and delivering "true experiences." We offer expertly designed tours, flexible travel packages, and personalized itineraries that cater to every traveler's needs. Our team of passionate, experienced guides ensures seamless journeys, from breathtaking sightseeing excursions to immersive cultural explorations. Whether you are seeking to discover Copenhagen's iconic landmarks, embark on an adventure to Malmö, or explore Denmark's majestic castles, Walk and Tour Copenhagen provides exceptional service, competitive pricing, and unforgettable travel memories.
